base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wiggler — a character (playable) from 1990 super mario world. Wiggler — yellow caterpillar. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wiggler — yellow caterpillar; jump-on-head turns red-angry
